In amitabh’s horoscope tenth lord from lagna is in the 8th
house badly affected. Since it is associated with
functional benefic planets it is moderately strong.
From the chandra lagna the tenth lord is in the first
house, which is very good.
From the karkamsha lagna tenth lord is in the second house
and associated with trikona lords/.
There fore his career was very good.
This is the method by which one can check the authencity of
the celebrity’s horoscope.

Amitabh Bachchan - The living legend! - published in sify.com
Tuesday, 28 January, 2003, 00:00
Amitabh Bachchan undoubtedly is a household name of every Indian, and probably
the only Bollywood star to be accepted and loved, irrespective of regional diversities.
